pi_items.source: Task specification - valid SLD style name
docker-compose.yml configuration and setup_geoserver.sh - workspace created for Natural Earth data
setup_geoserver.sh line 114 and Natural Earth dataset - official Natural Earth countries layer at 1:110m scale
Verified as valid hex color; RGB(224, 224, 224) = Material Design Grey 300 per Material UI documentation
Verified as valid hex color; RGB(51, 51, 51) = Dark Grey per W3C color standards
Verified as valid hex color; RGB(0, 0, 0) = Pure Black per W3C color standards
GeoServer documentation (https://docs.geoserver.org/stable/en/user/styling/sld/cookbook/polygons.html) confirms shape://slash as valid WellKnownName in GraphicFill for diagonal hatch patterns
docker-compose.yml line 25 specifies kartoza/geoserver:2.25.2; GeoServer 2.25.2 officially released June 18, 2024
install_geoserver.sh lines 62-68 download 110m scale Natural Earth cultural data
setup_geoserver.sh line 133 and docker-compose.yml line 33 define GeoServer admin user

privileged_info_summary: The task uses GeoServer 2.25.2 with PostGIS 15-3.3 backend. All metadata color values (#E0E0E0, #333333, #000000) are valid hex colors corresponding to Light Grey, Dark Grey, and Black respectively. The hatch pattern 'shape://slash' is a documented GeoServer SLD extension for diagonal hatching in GraphicFill elements. The 'ne' workspace and 'ne_countries' layer reference real Natural Earth 1:110m scale public domain country polygon data downloaded from naciscdn.org. The composite_hatch style name is a valid SLD identifier. Admin credentials are admin/Admin123!.
